source_discovery_method: extract tenant, site, portal, or requisition API identifiers from configured company URL
list_fetch_method: bounded API request to candidate/search endpoint through source runner
detail_fetch_method: detail fetch only when list response lacks geo/date/remote and parser certification covers detail shape
pagination_method: use documented limit/offset/cursor; stop on empty page, error, or job budget
canonical_url_rule: use source canonical/apply URL, absolutize relative URLs, strip tracking noise, and keep stable path identity
source_job_id_rule: list-payload: Requisition Id is available and must be preserved.
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, or usable canonical/apply URL; reject placeholders and blank titles
location_text_rule: list-payload: PrimaryLocation, TownOrCity, Region2, Country, or workLocation fields expose location evidence.
country_region_city_rule: list-payload: PrimaryLocation, TownOrCity, Region2, Country, or workLocation fields expose location evidence.
remote_type_rule: list-payload: WorkplaceType, worker type, job type, or source text can explicitly expose remote/hybrid evidence.
posting_date_rule: list-payload: PostedDate/postDate fields expose posting date when source includes it.
rate_limit: conservative tenant-level budget, per-host serialization, retry/backoff on 429/5xx

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: accepted rows must pass title/company/canonical_url and row-level quality gate

runner_interface.discover: extract tenant, site, portal, or requisition API identifiers from configured company URL
runner_interface.fetchList: bounded API request to candidate/search endpoint through source runner
runner_interface.fetchDetail: detail fetch only when list response lacks geo/date/remote and parser certification covers detail shape
runner_interface.normalize: server/ingestion/parserContract.js normalized posting shape plus source-specific normalizer
runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: audit raw payloads and add field-specific parser/backfill fixture
